---
title: "CV"
format: html
---

## Assoc. Prof. Dr. Volkan Işık

**Labour Economics | Social Policy | Social Entrepreneurship**

Hacettepe University  
Vocational School of Social Sciences  
Ankara, Türkiye  

📧 volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr  
🌐 [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3690-969X) | [Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/ADT-9246-2022) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/doç-dr-volkan-ışık-79150bbb/) | [AVESIS](https://avesis.hacettepe.edu.tr/volkani)

---

## Profile

Associate Professor with more than **18 years of academic and professional experience** in labour economics, social policy, occupational health and safety, labour law, social entrepreneurship, and labour market analysis. Experienced in teaching, academic research, EU-funded projects, TÜBİTAK-supported research, impact analysis, training design, and policy-oriented reporting.  

My work combines **academic research, field-based analysis, and applied project experience**, with a particular focus on labour market transitions, disadvantaged groups, social entrepreneurship ecosystems, and the future of work.

---

## Current Position

- **Associate Professor**, Hacettepe University *(since January 2019)*
- **Deputy Manager**, Vocational School of Social Sciences *(2022–Present)*
- **Deputy Manager**, Career Development Application and Research Center *(2024–Present)*

---

## Education

### Post-Doctoral Research
**Universitat Politècnica de València, Spain**  
*June 2024 – October 2024*  
TÜBİTAK 2219 Scholarship Program  
Research topic: *Strengthening the Social Entrepreneurship Ecosystem: Strategic Recommendations for Turkey through the Case of Valencia, Spain*

### Ph.D.
**Gazi University, Türkiye**  
*2009 – 2016*  
Field: Labour Economics and Industrial Relations  
Dissertation: *Analysis of the Social Enterprises Employment in Turkey within the Framework of the Third Sector Employment and the Changing Meaning of Labour: Ashoka Example*

### M.A.
**Gazi University, Türkiye**  
*2006 – 2009*  
Field: Labour Economics and Industrial Relations

### B.S.
**Cumhuriyet University, Türkiye**  
*2001 – 2005*  
Field: Labour Economics and Industrial Relations

### Associate Degree
**Anadolu University, Türkiye**  
*2021 – 2023*  
Field: Occupational Health and Safety

---

## Academic and Administrative Experience

### Hacettepe University
**Associate Professor**  
*2019 – Present*  
Vocational School of Social Sciences

### Hacettepe University
**Head of Department, Marketing**  
*2019 – 2022*

### Hacettepe University
**Board Member, Vocational School of Social Sciences**  
*2019 – Present*

### Hacettepe University
**Deputy Manager, Career Development Application and Research Center**  
*2024 – Present*

### Aksaray University
**Assistant Professor**  
*2016 – 2018*

### Gazi University
**Research and Teaching Assistant**  
*2008 – 2016*

### Aksaray University
**Research and Teaching Assistant**  
*2007 – 2008*

### Aksaray Provincial Employment and Vocational Education Board
**Board Member**  
*2017 – 2018*

---

## Research Interests

- Labour Market Analysis  
- Social Policy  
- Social Entrepreneurship  
- Occupational Health and Safety  
- Labour Law and Employment Relations  
- Gender Inequality and Employment  
- Disadvantaged Groups and Inclusive Labour Markets  
- Future of Work and Artificial Intelligence  

---

## Areas of Expertise

- Social Entrepreneurship and Business Model Development  
- Labour Law and Employment Regulations  
- Social Security Systems and Social Insurance  
- Occupational Health and Safety  
- Human Resource Management and Organizational Processes  
- Labour Market Analysis and Data-Driven Decision Making  

---

## Selected Project Experience

### Post-Doc Visiting Researcher
**INGENIO CSIC – Universitat Politècnica de València**  
*2024*  
Research on social entrepreneurship ecosystems and model development.

### Senior Non-Key Expert
**EU Project (İŞKUR)**  
*2024*  
Training delivery on migrants and long-term unemployed; impact analysis.

### Senior Non-Key Expert
**KfW and Ministry of Education (MEB)**  
*2024*  
Interview design, fieldwork, analysis of findings, final report preparation.

### Senior Non-Key Expert
**EU Project (İŞKUR)**  
*2022 – 2023*  
Research and reporting on evidence-based employment services for disadvantaged groups, especially migrants.

### Team Leader
**Eastern Anatolia Development Agency (DAKA)**  
*2019 – 2020*  
Project for harmonization of vocational education and labour market in the TRB2 Region.

### Junior / Senior Non-Key Expert
**EU Project (HAK-İŞ – MÜSİAD)**  
*2016 – 2017*  
Training on labour law, OHS, social dialogue, industrial relations, productivity, innovation, and atypical work.

### Project Scholar
**TÜBİTAK Project (Gazi University – İŞKUR)**  
*2008 – 2011*  
Labour market information collection, analysis, questionnaire design, and reporting.

---

## Publications

For the complete and updated publication list, please visit:  
👉 [Publications](./publications.html)

---

## Books

- *Çalışmanın Değişen Anlamı ve Sosyal Girişim*, Ekin Basım Yayın, 2016.  
- *Üç Bileşenli Eğitim İstihdam Dengesi Modeli Kastamonu Örneği*, SETA Yayınları, 2020.  
- *Mesleki Eğitimin İş Piyasası ile Uyumlaştırılmasında İhtiyaç Analizi ve Öz Değerlendirme Modeli*, SETA Yayınları, 2019.  
- *İşgücü Piyasası Mesleki Eğitim Uyumunda Bölgesel Markalaşma Modeli*, SETA Yayınları, 2020.  
- *Sosyal Girişimcilik*, Ekin Yayınları, 2021.  

---

## Editorial Role

- **Editor**, *Hacettepe University Journal of Social Sciences*

---

## Languages

- **Turkish** — Native  
- **English** — C1/C2  
- **Spanish** — A1/A2  

---

## Professional Memberships

- Employment Research Association  
- Social Policy Research Association  
- Buğday Association for Supporting Ecological Living  
- STAR – Social, Humanities and Basic Sciences Accreditation and Rating Association *(Member and Evaluator)*

---

## Skills

- Academic writing and reporting  
- Impact analysis  
- Training design and delivery  
- Workshop moderation  
- Labour market research  
- SPSS and Microsoft Office  
- Teamwork and multicultural collaboration  
- Project-based research and policy reporting
